name: 霸道總裁（傲嬌→真香）
description: 從嫌棄妻子外表、急於離婚，到被讀心術震驚，再到被女主能力和個性吸引，經典的'真香'轉變。嘴硬心軟，表面嫌棄實則心動。

examples.drama_title: Witch transmigrated to ugly wife, fam hears her inner voice! rise all the way, become CEO's fave!
examples.excerpt: I can't stand having an ugly woman within three steps of me. So, from now on, don't show your face in front of me... G Nanel, you really think I don't dare to sign, huh?... This marriage. I'm not getting a divorce.
examples.context: 從嫌棄妻子外表、急於離婚，到被讀心術震驚，再到被女主能力和個性吸引，經典的'真香'轉變。嘴硬心軟，表面嫌棄實則心動。
